info.name: Microsoft Azure AttestationClient
info.description: Describes the interface for the per-tenant enclave service.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Attest A Virtualization Based Security Vbs Enclave

query.description: (Required) Client API version. Current version is 2022-09-01-preview
